title: Judge Vista Draining Stainless Steel Large Saucepan with Pouring Lip 18cm 2.1L, Shatterproof Glass Strain & Pour Lid, Induction Ready, Oven Safe
features: • Double sided straining lid with variable draining options
description: Product Description ABOUT JUDGE Judge homewares have been a favourite in homes for more than a century. The brand is known all over the world for its high quality and impressive performance. JUDGE VISTA DRAINING STAINLESS STEEL KEY FEATURES Impressive performance with even heat distribution on all hob types Easy draining with a double-sided draining lid that also allows for adjustable steam release Time-saving measuring guides Safe and secure handling, easy-grip, comfortable, phenolic low-heat transmission handles Shatter proof glass lids with vents to prevent over boiling OVEN SAFE HANDLES All the pans can be used on the hob or inside the oven up to 180℃. They feel safe and secure thanks to easy grip, comfortable, low-heat transmission handles that stay cooler to the touch. IMPRESSIVE PERFORMANCE Designed to give outstanding cooking results on all types of hob, with a thick 'hot forged base' to ensure efficient and even heat distribution for years to come. EFFORTLESS DRAINING Shatterproof glass lids let you keep an eye on what’s cooking. Draining holes at the edge and a generous pouring lip mean there’s no need to use a colander to strain your vegetables.
